question: Based on the chart of rainfall (mm) over the 14 days, which statement best describes the total rainfall in the first 7 days compared with the last 7 days of the period?

options.A: Total rainfall in the first 7 days is higher than in the last 7 days.
options.B: Total rainfall in the last 7 days is higher than in the first 7 days.
options.C: Total rainfall is roughly the same in the first and last 7 days.
options.D: Total rainfall is concentrated mainly in the first few days, with much lower amounts later on.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the last segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
